data.description:
Enable the feature for THIS project + docs + full test pass. Done LAST so build-time closes aren't gated.

## Scope (files)
- `.rebar/config.conf` (NEW): **dotted** keys (BL-1) `verify.require_completion_verification_for_close = true` + `mcp.allow_llm = true`; test that `load_config()` reflects it.
- `docs/llm-framework.md`: completion-verification section (op, contract, gate, trust model, force-close, pluggable contract). `CLAUDE.md`: add `verify_completion` to the LLM-ops list + gate flag. `docs/output-schemas.md`: add `completion_verdict` row.
- Tests: config (BL-1 regression), gate behavior, schema coverage guard, optionality, BI-1.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] dotted `.rebar/config.conf` enables the gate (verified via load_config); INI form negative test
- [ ] docs updated (llm-framework / CLAUDE.md / output-schemas)
- [ ] full suite green (`-m "not integration and not external"`)
data.title: WS-5: Enable for this project + docs + tests
